title: vicia ciliatula
intro: Vicia ciliatula, also known as small pea or small vetch, is a perennial plant belonging to the pea family Fabaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Vicia ciliatula include its potential to reduce blood pressure, improve digestion, and alleviate symptoms of colds and fever. Herbal preparations of Vicia ciliatula can be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, and are often used to treat respiratory issues and skin conditions.
